summary:
N. gonorrhoea commonly causes male urethritis; however, it’s erroneous to assert that every strain remains completely sensitive to penicillin today. Thus, I choose \boxed{B} for falsity among these options based solely upon contemporary understanding regarding antibiotic resistances against such bacteria. 

The summary focuses clearly on why 'penicillin sensitivity' cannot apply uniformly anymore while maintaining brevity consistent with your instructions. Let me know further refinements needed!
